# Editorial Templates

Reusable structures belong here after they have passed CHIEF review.

## Planned Templates

- `problem_brief.md`
- `editorial_brief.md`
- `comparison_article.md`
- `how_to_article.md`
- `product_test_log.md`
- `review_report.md`
- `update_report.md`

Templates provide structure, not invented substance. Missing evidence remains explicitly missing.
